evals.prompt: I'm about to launch a B2B SaaS product for developer teams. What should I audit before launch? Give me a structured checklist.
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive audit checklist covering at least: pre-launch validation, pricing, payments, AI economics (if applicable), discovery/SEO, competitors, social presence, legal compliance, trust infrastructure, and launch day operations.

assertions.text: The checklist includes a pricing audit section that covers pricing page clarity, tier structure, and competitive positioning.
The checklist includes a legal/compliance section covering privacy policy, terms of service, and cookie consent.
The checklist includes trust infrastructure items such as uptime monitoring, status page, error tracking, or logging.
Items in the checklist use PASS/FAIL or YES/NO states (not vague recommendations) so the audit is repeatable.

evals.prompt: My SaaS uses GPT-4 for AI features. What should I check regarding AI economics before launch?
evals.expected_output: A response covering AI unit economics: cost per request, margin analysis, rate limiting, caching strategies, model selection for cost optimization, and usage-based pricing considerations.

assertions.text: The response discusses calculating cost per API request or per-user AI cost.
The response discusses margin analysis — ensuring AI costs don't eat into pricing margins.
The response mentions rate limiting or usage caps to prevent cost runaway.
